Man City 3-0 Liverpool: Doku Shines in Guardiola’s 1,000th Game

Nov 10, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Man City 3-0 Liverpool: Doku Shines in Guardiola’s 1,000th Game

Manchester City marked manager Pep Guardiola’s 1,000th match with an emphatic 3–0 victory over Liverpool at the Etihad Stadium. Goals from Erling Haaland, Nico González and a brilliant strike by Jérémy Doku sealed the result, as City dominated throughout. Doku was particularly impressive, driving the attack with direct runs and finishing with the third goal that put the game beyond doubt. Guardiola described the performance as a “gift” from his players.
